title: epipactis × vermionensis
intro: Epipactis × vermionensis is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Epipactis palustris and Epipactis helleborine. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its rich content of iridoids and phenolic compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Epipactis × vermionensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to the lack of comprehensive research on its safety and efficacy.
